To find out, we need to sort the data based on the "time" column in the order of "small to large" using the f_sort_column(time) operation. This will allow us to see the countries' finishing times arranged from the earliest (smallest time) to the latest (largest time), making it easy to compare Thailand and Japan's performance.

The question is asking to determine which country, Thailand or Japan, had a better (earlier) finishing time. The fastest time for Japan is 10.64, and the fastest time for Thailand is 10.72. Since 10.64 is earlier than 10.72, Japan finished earlier than Thailand.
